form.formComment: Found some support last start but struggled and finished 6th in a Grade 5 on March 17 over 340m at this track behind Don't Tell Tommy beaten 15 lengths (20.16). Placed two back at this track. Has run very fast time at this course and distance. Go close on her best form.
